mapper.select: SELECT sc.*, e.name AS exam_name, st.name AS student_name FROM score sc LEFT JOIN exam e ON sc.exam_id = e.id LEFT JOIN student st ON sc.student_id = st.id ORDER BY sc.id
SELECT sc.*, e.name AS exam_name, st.name AS student_name FROM score sc LEFT JOIN exam e ON sc.exam_id = e.id LEFT JOIN student st ON sc.student_id = st.id WHERE sc.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO score (exam_id, student_id, score, rank_num, remark) VALUES (#{examId}, #{studentId}, #{score}, #{rankNum}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE score SET exam_id=#{examId}, student_id=#{studentId}, score=#{score}, rank_num=#{rankNum}, remark=#{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
